  alignItems: center;
  color: inherit;
  font-style: normal;
  line-height: 0;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: none;
  vertical-align: -0.125em;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

.anticon > * {
  line-height: 1;
}

.anticon svg {
  display: inline-block;
}

.anticon::before {
  display: none;
}

.anticon .anticon-icon {
  display: block;
}

.anticon[tabindex] {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.anticon-spin::before,
.anticon-spin {
  display: inline-block;
  -webkit-animation: loadingCircle 1s infinite linear;
  animation: loadingCircle 1s infinite linear;
}

  100% {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

  100% {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

  display: none;

  right: 0;

  left: 0;
  z-index: 105000;
  overflow: hidden;
  outline: 0;

  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s linear;
}

  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.vreview-overlay-widget {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border: none;
  min-height: calc(100% - (0.5rem * 2));
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

  display: block;
  background-color: rgba(1, 1, 1, 0.3);
  opacity: 1;
}

/* Dom control */
.vreview-review-summary {
  text-decoration: unset !important;
  font-family: var(--font-pretendard);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: normal;
  line-height: 19px;
  color: #3a4046;
  letter-spacing: 0.006em;
}
.vreview-review-summary * {
  margin: 0;
}

.vreview-review-summary .vreview-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: start;
}

.vreview-review-summary .vreview-stack {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.vreview-review-summary .vreview-divider {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1px;
  background-color: #c9cfd6;
  margin: 12px 0;
}

.vreview-review-summary .vreview-board-popup {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.vreview-review-summary .vreview-link {
  color: #707070;
  text-decoration: underline;
  font-weight: 400;
}

/* Dom control - Dark mode */
[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary,
:root[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
}

[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary .vreview-divider,
:root[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary .vreview-divider {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}

[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary .vreview-link,
:root[data-mode='dark'] .vreview-review-summary .vreview-link {
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
}
/* Dom control */

.vreview-embed-widget-iframe {
  display: block !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

.vreview-best-review-widget-iframe {
  margin: auto !important;
  max-width: 1025px !important;
}
.vreview-main-widget-iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  margin: 30px auto !important;
  max-width: 1140px !important;
}
.vreview-collection-widget-iframe {
  margin: auto !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  max-width: 1025px !important;
}
.vreview-grid-widget-iframe {
  margin: auto !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  max-width: 1025px !important;
}
.vreview-myreview-widget-iframe {
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  max-width: 1060px !important;
}
.vreview-board-widget-iframe {
  margin: 30px auto !important;
  max-width: 1060px !important;
}
.vreview-album-widget-iframe {
  margin: 30px auto !important;
  max-width: 1060px !important;
}
.vreview-personal-widget-iframe {
  margin: 30px auto !important;
  max-width: 1060px !important;
}
.vreview-shopping-snapshot-widget-iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  margin: 20px auto !important;
  max-width: 1140px !important;
}
.vreview-sns-clip-widget-iframe {
  width: 100% !important;
  margin: 20px auto !important;
  max-width: 1140px !important;
}

.vreview-review-write-event:not(.clickable) {
  display: none;
}

.vreview-align-center {
  justify-content: center !important;
}

.vreview-rating {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: -3px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.vreview-hide {
  display: none !important;
}

      <span style="display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:8px;customStatText-decoration:none;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:5px">
        <span>4.6</span>
        <span class="vreview-link">147개 리뷰</span>
      </span>
    </div>
